Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course prepares students for public service careers ("有志投身公職的學生") and covers "人事管理" (personnel management), contributing to decent work within the public sector (Target 8.5).

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course's focus on "公共服務價值觀" (public service values) and "公共事務關懷" (concern for public affairs) supports the principle of inclusive public service, linking to Target 10.2.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: Topics like "政府資源管理" (Government resource management) and "財務管理" (financial management) are prerequisites for sustainable public procurement practices, linking to Target 12.7.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course is fundamentally about building effective, accountable institutions (Target 16.6) and covers "行政倫理" (administrative ethics) to combat corruption (Target 16.5).
